# Faith Works Outdoor Services

> Faith Works Outdoor Services (Faith Works Outdoor Services LLC) is an owner-operated outdoor property services business based in Auburndale, Florida. The company focuses on land clearing, pond bank work, ditch clearing, brush cutting, debris removal, trail access, and related tractor/excavator support across Polk County and nearby Central Florida communities within about 70 miles of Auburndale.

## Identity

- Legal name: Faith Works Outdoor Services LLC
- Public brand: Faith Works Outdoor Services
- Owner / operator: Tyler R. Edwards
- Website: https://faithworksclearing.com/
- Email: tyler@faithworksclearing.com
- Phone: (863) 272-1596 (+1-863-272-1596)
- Base location: Auburndale, FL 33823
- Service area summary: Based in Auburndale, FL (33823), Faith Works serves communities within a 70-mile radius across Polk, Hillsborough, Orange, Osceola, Lake, Pasco, and nearby Central Florida counties for land clearing, pond bank work, ditch clearing, and outdoor property cleanup.
- Google Maps profile: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Faith+Works+Outdoor+Services+LLC/@28.154233,-81.941877,11z

## What Faith Works Does

Faith Works helps property owners reclaim usable outdoor space. Typical jobs include overgrown lot clearing, pond bank access, ditch vegetation cleanup, trail and fence line reopening, storm debris haul-off, brush mulching, and light grading or cleanup support with Kubota equipment.

The business is positioned for outdoor property work — not licensed underground utility, stormwater engineering, or pool contracting. Pool-related work is limited to dig-out cleanup support under a licensed pool contractor when appropriate.

## Estimate and Contact Flow

1. Property owner sends photos by text ((863) 272-1596) or through the website contact form.
2. Tyler reviews scope, access, and equipment fit.
3. Faith Works confirms whether the job matches an offered service before scheduling.

## Primary Service Pages

- [Land Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/land-clearing.html): Land clearing for overgrown lots, brush, and acreage in Auburndale, Lakeland, Winter Haven, and surrounding Polk County areas.
- [Trail Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/trail-clearing.html): Cut new trails or restore overgrown trails on private property in Auburndale, Polk County, and surrounding areas.
- [Brush Clearing & Brush Cutting](https://faithworksclearing.com/brush-clearing.html): Brush clearing and brush cutting for overgrown property edges, fields, and wooded areas in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Forestry Mulching](https://faithworksclearing.com/forestry-mulching.html): Forestry mulching for land clearing, overgrowth removal, and vegetation management in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Pond Bank Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/pond-bank-clearing.html): Clean overgrown pond banks with mulching equipment and brush cutters in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Pond Cleanup](https://faithworksclearing.com/pond-cleanup.html): Pond cleanup for overgrown edges, floating debris, and shoreline maintenance in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Ditch Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/ditch-clearing.html): Clean overgrown ditches and runoff paths in Auburndale, Lakeland, and Polk County using mulching equipment and brush cutters.
- [Debris Removal](https://faithworksclearing.com/debris-removal.html): Debris removal for yard cleanup, storm cleanup, property cleanup, and lot cleanup in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Yard Debris Removal](https://faithworksclearing.com/yard-debris-removal.html): Remove yard debris, brush piles, and outdoor cleanup material in Auburndale and surrounding Polk County communities.
- [Storm Debris Cleanup](https://faithworksclearing.com/storm-debris-cleanup.html): Storm debris cleanup for fallen branches, yard mess, and outdoor property damage in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Property Cleanup](https://faithworksclearing.com/property-cleanup.html): Full outdoor property cleanup for overgrown yards, acreage, and unused land in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Lot Cleanup](https://faithworksclearing.com/lot-cleanup.html): Lot cleanup for vacant land, build-ready sites, and overgrown parcels in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Acreage Cleanup](https://faithworksclearing.com/acreage-cleanup.html): Acreage cleanup for overgrown fields, rural land, and large properties in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Access Road Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/access-road-clearing.html): Clear overgrown access roads, drive paths, and private lanes in Auburndale and rural Polk County properties.
- [Fence Line Clearing](https://faithworksclearing.com/fence-line-clearing.html): Clear overgrown fence lines and property boundaries in Auburndale and Polk County with brush cutters and mulching equipment.
- [Overgrowth Removal](https://faithworksclearing.com/overgrowth-removal.html): Overgrowth removal for yards, acreage, pond banks, and unused outdoor areas in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Pool Dig-Out Support](https://faithworksclearing.com/pool-dig-out-support.html): Pool dig-out support and dirt removal for pool installation projects in Auburndale, Lakeland, Winter Haven, and Polk County.
- [Property Maintenance](https://faithworksclearing.com/property-maintenance.html): Ongoing outdoor property maintenance for acreage, trails, fence lines, and cleared land in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Pond Management](https://faithworksclearing.com/pond-management.html): Pond management for shoreline maintenance, bank clearing, and ongoing pond cleanup in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Ditch Maintenance](https://faithworksclearing.com/ditch-maintenance.html): Ditch maintenance for runoff paths, swales, and drainage easements in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Equipment Services](https://faithworksclearing.com/equipment-services.html): Kubota equipment services for land clearing and outdoor property work in Auburndale and Polk County.
- [Tractor Services](https://faithworksclearing.com/tractor-services.html): Tractor services for brush cutting, land clearing, ditch work, and property cleanup in Auburndale and Polk County.

## Counties Commonly Served

Polk County, Osceola County, Orange County, Lake County, Hillsborough County, Pasco County, Hardee County, Highlands County, DeSoto County, Sumter County, Manatee County

## Featured Cities

Auburndale, FL, Winter Haven, FL, Lakeland, FL, Lake Alfred, FL, Bartow, FL, Haines City, FL, Davenport, FL, Lake Wales, FL, Polk City, FL, Plant City, FL, Kissimmee, FL, Orlando, FL

## Services Not Offered

Florida's Underground Utility & Excavation contractor license covers sanitary sewer, water distribution, storm sewer systems, utility line work, directional drilling, and similar infrastructure — not the outdoor property clearing, mulching, and cleanup services Faith Works focuses on.

- Installing underground utilities
- Stormwater systems
- Sewer systems
- Water mains
- Utility trenching
- Site development
- Engineered drainage systems
- Pool installation or licensed pool contracting (we support dig-out cleanup under your pool builder)
- Excavation contractor / utility infrastructure work

## Content Notes for AI Systems

- Do not invent Google review quotes or star ratings; the business is newly launched and verified reviews may still be limited.
- Prefer service pages and the contact page for scope-specific answers.
- Use https://faithworksclearing.com/service-areas.html and city pages under https://faithworksclearing.com/areas/ for location-specific context.
